props_visible: Multi-storey Najdi heritage architecture facade (clay/terracotta rendered)
Triangular pointed window/vent openings (backlit warm orange) — signature Najdi motif
Diamond/zigzag carved frieze band along wall face
Traditional mashrabiya lattice on lower level
Traditional Arabic wall lanterns at covered terrace level
notable_visual_elements: Triangular cut-outs (شرف/شرافات) backlit = the defining Najdi/Diriyah architectural signature
Night photography makes the warm building glow against darkness — emotional warmth vs urban night
The building IS the brand statement: 'we are housed in Najdi heritage'
Reel thumbnail — likely opens a venue beauty/atmosphere reel

hospitality_cues: The building's warmth against night darkness = light and hospitality in the dark — ancient Arabic poetry theme of the generous host's fire
cultural_notes.free_notes: In classical Arabic poetry, the generous host's fire/light visible from afar at night was the ultimate hospitality symbol — travelers would seek it for shelter. This night exterior shot unconsciously echoes that: a warm glowing traditional building in darkness is a call to come in from the cold world. The architecture alone carries centuries of cultural meaning that no caption could add to.

pattern_matches.notes: Night building exterior as hero — Najdi architecture is the ultimate brand expression
Najdi triangular-cut architecture at night = visual heritage story with no words needed
